name: ImageListComboBox
summary: The ImageListComboBox class represents a combo box control that can contain images from an ImageList control.

constructors.name: ImageListComboBox
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ImageListComboBox class.

properties.name: DefaultValue
properties.summary: Gets or sets the default value in the image combo box. If the value is not found, SelectedItem is used instead.

properties.name: HoverColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the hover color of the combo box.

properties.name: ImageList
properties.summary: Gets or sets the ImageList that contains the images to be displayed in the combo box. Recommended image file formats are JPG and BMP.

properties.name: SelectedIndex
properties.summary: Gets or sets the selected index of the image in the image combo box.

properties.name: SelectedItem
properties.summary: Gets or sets the selected image in the image combo box. If the image is not found, SelectedIndex is used instead.

properties.name: ToolTipText
properties.summary: Gets or sets the tool tip text.

events.name: ImageListComboBoxMouseWheel
events.summary: The ImageListComboBoxMouseWheel event is triggered just after the mouse wheel has been activated on top of the combo box.

events.name: ImageListComboBoxSelectedIndexChanged
events.summary: The ImageListComboBoxSelectedIndexChanged event is triggered just after the selected index has been changed in the image combo box.
